svg.text: Callaway-Sant'Anna ATT by event time, county grain (OR) -- permitless carry (county grain)
Motor vehicle theft rate (per 100k, county UCR) [placebo]
State firearm suicide rate (joined down) [no county variation]
State total suicide rate (joined down) [no county variation]
State firearm homicide rate (joined down) [no county variation]
Shaded band: pointwise 95% CI from state-clustered Rademacher bootstrap. Vertical dashed line marks the year before adoption.
